message:
✨ Benchmark UI polish: dark chart bg, generic title, hover stats panel (#956)

- Darken ParetoFrontier chart background (#1a1d2e) with matching dark
  axis/tooltip/label styling for better contrast in the dark theme
- Rename card title from "Pareto Frontier" to "Performance Explorer"
  since it now has 10 different chart presets
- Add hover detail panel to NightlyE2EStatus: hovering a test row shows
  pass rate, pass/fail/cancelled/running counts, consecutive streak,
  last pass/fail timestamps, and run history on the right side

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
